title: Tamil Nadu Governor asks TVK chief Vijay to produce proof of support of majority MLAs
description: The TVK has emerged as the single largest party in Tamil Nadu Assembly, winning 108 seats in the 234-member House; DMK’s allies CPI(M), CPI, and VCK, which have won two seats each, are yet to decide on support; IUML has refused backing; Congress says ‘yes’ but AIADMK ‘no’
